p.seg: To all who shall view or hear this writing Agnes Avenel the first-born daughter of the late Ralph Avenel sends greeting in the Lord.

Know me to have granted, and by rod and staff to have resigned, and for myself and my heirs entirely quitclaimed, to the lord Robert de Brus the lord of Annandale the entire land which I had or shall be able to have in the holding of 'Withstan' in the feu of Tundergarth and 'Holgrilmire' and my entire meadow of Capilker, with all other pertinents belonging to the said land everywhere, or by any means being able to belong, without any withholding, for the said lord Robert de Brus or his heirs or his assigns to have and to hold for ever so that neither I or my heirs, nor anyone in our name shall certainly be able to exact or claim any right or claim in the said land.
In testimony of this matter I have applied my seal to this writing.

With these witnesses, the lords Humphrey de Jardin, Robert of Harrington, David of Torthorwald, Humphrey del Bois, knights, Geoffrey of Caldicote, Adam Fleming, Robert the forester, John of Resholes, and others.
